caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, wearing a light-colored Nehru jacket over a long-sleeved shirt, stands behind a brown wooden podium. He is delivering a speech in front of a textured green marble wall featuring a geometric, tiered pattern. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. The man is actively gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points; he begins by opening his hand, then raises his right index finger, briefly moves his hand away from his body, and returns to pointing with his index finger. Behind him, vertical gold-colored pillars with small red floral accents are visible. The setting remains constant across the sequence, with only the man's facial expressions and hand movements changing as he speaks. There is no visible on-screen text or logos.
